function_signature: def train_step(center_idx: int, context_idx: int, neg_indices: list[int], W: np.ndarray, W_prime: np.ndarray) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, float]
performance_target: Loss decreases over 1000 training steps on toy corpus. Word similarity within 8% of Table 1.
description: Implement the skip-gram negative sampling training step from Mikolov et al. 2013.
